testSteps.description: When the user logs in with username "standard_user" and password "secret_sauce"
And the user adds 2 products to the cart
And the user navigates to the cart
Then the cart should contain 2 items
When the user completes checkout with first name "Test", last name "User" and zip "12345"
Then the user should see the confirmation message "THANK YOU FOR YOUR ORDER"
